---
title: "Tidy Tuesday Projects"
---

Welcome! This site hosts my data analysis reports from the [TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) project — a weekly social data project in R.

## Reports

### 2026

| Week | Topic | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 03 | [Languages of Africa](reports/2026/2026-week-03_languages-of-africa.qmd) | Analyzing linguistic diversity across 51 African countries and 502 languages |

### 2025

| Week | Topic | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 17 | [Daily Accidents & 4/20](reports/2025/2025-week-17_daily-accidents.qmd) | Investigating whether fatal accidents increase on April 20th |

### 2024

| Week | Topic | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 03 | [NHL Players & The Relative Age Effect](reports/2024/2024-week-03_nhl-players.qmd) | Exploring birth month bias in professional hockey |
